# Contributing

## Conventions
### Commit
- feat
- fix
- refactor
- chore
- docs
- test
- style

### Rules
- Scope must be in `PascalCase`
- del is not valid, should be replaced with refactor

### Branching
- feature/name
- refactor/name
- chore/name
- docs/name
- fix/name

---

## Workflow

### Before
- Check module
- Add exercices as issues/subissues with correct milestone

### During
- Check github issues from milestone
- Work on it

### After
- Check if all things from issue done
- Close issue 
- Change status to `to-review`

### After review
- Change status to `reviewed` or reset to `to-review` and add issues
